label: work
title: Radiology report
content:
EXAMINATION:  CHEST (PORTABLE AP)

INDICATION:  ___ year old man with 3VD and s/p balloon pump  // eval IABP     
eval IABP

COMPARISON:  Chest radiographs since ___, most recently one ___.

IMPRESSION: 

Heart size normal.  Pulmonary vasculature engorged, lungs are otherwise clear.
No edema.  No pleural effusion.  Normal mediastinal silhouette.  Tip of the
intra-aortic balloon pump in standard position midway between the apex of the
aorta and left main bronchus.  No pneumothorax.
